overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing a character interacting with a vendor in a neon-lit alley before walking through an urban plaza and along a waterfront promenade at night. The scene features wet reflective surfaces, contrasting cyan and warm neon lighting, and palm trees lining the coastal area.

events.description: dialogue text appears on screen indicating conversation with vendor
vendor character turns and begins walking away from the stall

agents.ego_description: standing still facing the vendor, engaged in dialogue interaction

notable_agents.action: vendor woman standing at food stall, gesturing while talking to player
man sitting on chair against the wall looking at a device

street food cart with warm overhead lighting and metal awning
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the alley
grill and food preparation surfaces on the vendor stall
illuminated advertisements visible in the background alleyway

segments.scene_description: A static scene in a narrow neon-lit alley where the player interacts with a vendor at her food stall. The environment features prominent cyan neon lighting on the left wall, warm light from the stall, and an overhead walkway above. A man sits against the wall to the left while dialogue text appears on screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with concrete stairs leading to elevated walkway

events.description: moving from enclosed alley into open plaza area with wider space
character begins ascending wide concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: following the vendor character as she walks through the plaza and climbs the stairs

notable_agents.action: vendor character walking briskly across plaza and up the stairs

entered.detail: open paved area with wet reflective concrete surface
wide staircase with multiple steps leading upward
large illuminated advertisement screen on building facade
tall palm trees visible in the background against the night sky
contemporary building structure with glass and concrete elements

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the vendor as she leaves the stall and moves through an open urban plaza. The environment transitions from the narrow neon alley to a wider space with concrete stairs leading upward. A large digital billboard is visible on the left, and palm trees appear in the distant background as the character ascends the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees and coastal road

events.description: reaching the waterfront with view of ocean and palm-lined coast
vehicles passing by on the wet coastal road to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront sidewalk next to the coastal road with ocean view

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking along the waterfront path in the same direction

entered.detail: wet asphalt road with moving vehicle traffic and street lighting
dark ocean water visible beyond the line of palm trees
raised highway structure with support columns running parallel to the coast
tall modern street lamp illuminating the sidewalk with bright light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a waterfront promenade with palm trees lining the left side and the ocean visible in the distance. The wet concrete reflects the street lamps and vehicle headlights from the coastal road. An elevated highway structure runs parallel on the right as the camera moves forward along the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a claustrophobic, neon-lit alleyway into a wide, open waterfront promenade at night. It begins in a narrow corridor dominated by cyan neon lights and the warm glow of a food stall, where the camera lingers during an interaction with a vendor. As the vendor leaves her stall, the scene expands into a spacious urban plaza, moving past a large digital billboard and ascending concrete stairs toward distant palm trees. The environment then shifts to a coastal path, where the camera glides along a wet promenade reflecting street lamps and headlights. Finally, the view opens up to the ocean on the left and an elevated highway on the right as the camera continues its forward motion through the city.
